add.title: Add Component Groups
add.description: Component groups to add when the event runs.

items.description: Name of a component group defined in 'component_groups'.

remove.title: Remove Component Groups
remove.description: Component groups to remove when the event runs.

items.description: Name of a component group defined in 'component_groups'.

sequence.title: Event Sequence
sequence.description: An ordered sequence of sub-events to run in order.

randomize.title: Randomized Sub-events
randomize.description: A list of weighted sub-events. One is picked at random when the parent event fires.

weight.description: Relative weight of this entry being picked.

filters.description: Optional. Conditions that must be met for the event to run.
